RemediationStrings.Title: EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: HypervisorEnforcedCodeIntegrity (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\HypervisorEnforcedCodeIntegrity must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: HVCIMATRequired (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\HVCIMATRequired must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: LsaCfgFlags (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\LsaCfgFlags must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: MachineIdentityIsolation (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\MachineIdentityIsolation must be 3. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConfigureSystemGuardLaunch (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\ConfigureSystemGuardLaunch must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.

RemediationStrings.Title: ConfigureKernelShadowStacksLaunch (Device Guard)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceGuard\ConfigureKernelShadowStacksLaunch must be 1. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Guard.
